audit_items.proof_trace: Deduplication uses blockRootHex (hash of full BeaconBlockHeader including bodyRoot) instead of (slot, proposer_index) as spec requires. This allows equivocating proposers to have multiple data column sidecars accepted for the same (slot, proposer_index, column_index) tuple if they produce blocks with different bodies.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Malicious proposer creates two blocks A and B at same slot with different bodies (different bodyRoot), producing valid signatures and data column sidecars for column index 0 for both. Both sidecars pass validation and are cached separately (different blockRootHex values), violating spec requirement to accept only the first sidecar for tuple (slot, proposer_index, index).
